title: Listen To Ms Ray’s Splendid Melt EP
author: Margaret Farrell
summary:

The post Listen To Ms Ray’s Splendid <em>Melt</em> EP appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Last month London vocalist Ms Ray released a very good song "Miss You" with Nourished By Time. That song was a preview of her forthcoming EP Melt, which is out today. The five tracks are geometric pop song, drawing from R&B, dream-pop, and synth-pop. Some moments remind me of Cate Le Bon or Sade. 

Melt is described as "a collection of intimate songs for your heart and ears. Musing on what happens when love takes over every part of you. Ms Ray brings her tender-hearted songwriting to every corner of the EP." Ms Ray added that it's “an ode to devotion and all it requires of us, connecting us all in the involuntary immersion of deep love.”

Listen below.
